description_long: This doll features a tall, slender humanoid body with exaggeratedly long arms and legs, giving it a surreal and slightly eerie appearance. Its head is shaped like a cartoonish black cat, with large pointed ears, wide purple eyes, and a broad, toothy grin filled with sharp white teeth. The body is entirely black, with a ribbed, skeletal torso and thin limbs, while the hands are oversized and colored a stark white, resembling gloves. The surface of the doll appears matte and slightly textured, with a hard plastic or resin construction. The overall design is stylized and reminiscent of urban street art or characters from animated horror genres. This doll would stand out as a unique and eye-catching figure in an urban environment, such as a park or playground.
description: A tall, black cat-headed doll with long limbs, white gloved hands, and a wide, toothy grin. Its stylized, skeletal body and cartoonish features give it a striking, surreal appearance.
description_view_0: Front view shows the cat-like head, wide grin, purple eyes, and both long arms with white gloved hands visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the extreme thinness of the body and limbs, with the cat head's profile and one gloved hand visible.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the back of the cat head, the elongated limbs, and the white gloves, with less facial detail visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view again emphasizes the thin profile, with the cat head's side and one gloved hand in view.
attribute_clothing_style: No visible clothing; the doll's body is entirely black with white glove-like hands, resembling a stylized cartoon character.
attribute_pose: Standing upright with arms extended downward and slightly outward, legs straight and close together, head facing forward.
attribute_facial_expression: Wide, toothy grin with large, open purple eyes and no visible eyebrows, giving a perpetually smiling and slightly menacing expression.
attribute_hair_style: No visible hair; the head is smooth and shaped like a cartoon cat with pointed ears.
